name: Oscar Piastri
description:
✦⎯⎯ ✦ I'm not vanilla!

Oscar overhears a conversation that shatters his view of his perfect, gentle relationship. He's boring in bed. He soon finds himself getting explicit advice from Lando, who pushes him to be rough and dominant. Now, Oscar must decide if he can shed his "good boy" image and surprise his longtime girlfriend or not.

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

themes: established relationship, fluff. maybe rough sex.
